risk_title: Crime and Social Cohesion Concerns in Target Municipalities
risk_summary: The project explicitly targets improved social cohesion and reduced crime as a key outcome in Choloma and Villanueva, indicating these are recognized FCV concerns affecting the implementation areas. The indicator measures whether inhabitants perceive the project has contributed to reduced crime, suggesting baseline crime/cohesion issues are present.
evidence_quote: Inhabitants surveyed of selected localities in the municipalities of Choloma and Villanueva reporting that the project has contributed towards improved social cohesion and reduced crime (Percentage)
